title: Food Overhaul - Farmer's Delight
description: An addon for 'Food Overhaul', that adds support for 'Farmer's Delight Refabricated'.
body:
# Food Overhaul - Farmer's Delight (Refabricated)

An addon for [Food Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/food-overhaul), that adds support for [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated).

Adds a collection of food effects, that are designed to be used with food items added by Farmer's Delight. Eating food applies these effects.

Also adds "overhauled" variants of the food blocks added by Farmer's Delight. These overhauled food blocks provide food effects and can be individually configured ingame (Creative mode only).

Installing [Health Regeneration Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-regeneration-overhaul), [Mana Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mana-attributes), [Overhauled Damage](https://modrinth.com/mod/overhauled-damage) and/or [Stamina Attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/stamina-attributes) gives most food effects additional attributes.

Mods like [Food Effect Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/foodeffecttooltips) are recommended.

Credits:
The status effect icons are an exact copy of the item sprites from Farmer's Delight Refabricated.
